system.description: A delicious tea mixed with a powerful soporific drug used by Alice Liddell, the Director of Wonder. Those who drink the tea must make a Defense Check or fall into a deep sleep for over eight hours. Only suffering severe pain (equivalent to receiving 1 Wound) or the use of magic can awaken a sleeping subject. Alice uses this tea to incapacitate intruders and unwilling patients, offering it under the pretense of hospitality.
